'''rahopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ufonaut|ufonaut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ufonaut|ufonaut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rahopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhepeth|ræhepeth]] || [[word:ræhepej|ræhepej]] || [[word:ræhepesh|ræhepesh]] || [[word:ræhepe|ræhepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahohopoth|rahohopoth]] || [[word:rahohopoj|rahohopoj]] || [[word:rahohoposh|rahohoposh]] || [[word:rahohopo|rahohopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahopoth|rahopoth]] || [[word:rahopoj|rahopoj]] || [[word:rahoposh|rahoposh]] || [[word:rahopo|rahopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahofpoth|rahofpoth]] || [[word:rahofpoj|rahofpoj]] || [[word:rahofposh|rahofposh]] || [[word:rahofpof|rahofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahopotho|rahopotho]] || [[word:rahopojo|rahopojo]] || [[word:rahoposho|rahoposho]] || [[word:rahopoko|rahopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahopoth|rahopoth]] || [[word:rahopoj|rahopoj]] || [[word:rahoposh|rahoposh]] || [[word:rahopo|rahopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahopothol|rahopothol]] || [[word:rahopojol|rahopojol]] || [[word:rahoposhol|rahoposhol]] || [[word:rahopokol|rahopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahopothotho|rahopothotho]] || [[word:rahopojojo|rahopojojo]] || [[word:rahoposhosho|rahoposhosho]] || [[word:rahopoko|rahopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahopothon|rahopothon]] || [[word:rahopojon|rahopojon]] || [[word:rahoposhon|rahoposhon]] || [[word:rahopokon|rahopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahopothoro|rahopothoro]] || [[word:rahopojoro|rahopojoro]] || [[word:rahoposhoro|rahoposhoro]] || [[word:rahopokoro|rahopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
